title: The Sun, the Moon, & the Hurricane
original_title: The Sun, the Moon and the Hurricane
overview: A story about Rain, a man in his thirties, in quest of happiness, love and the purpose of his life and all incident that occurred. About the people he met and places he went to that shaped his destiny.
